name: BarChart
visual_summary: The BarChart is a graphical representation of data where the height of bars is proportional to their values. It is commonly used to compare categories and trends over time. A developer would use the BarChart to show data sets with distinct categories, such as sales by region or stock prices over time.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready chart component with the following characteristics:

Name: BarChart
Description: The BarChart is a graphical representation of data where the height of bars is proportional to their values. It is commonly used to compare categories and trends over time. A developer would use the BarChart to show data sets with distinct categories, such as sales by region or stock prices over time.
Style: dark, colorful, responsive
Interactions: clickable, hover
Tags: chart, data visualization, recharts

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
Reference implementation (adapt don't copy):
